'''tafodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:psamment|psamment]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-f-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:psamment|psamment]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tafodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæfedheth|tæfedheth]] || [[word:tæfedhej|tæfedhej]] || [[word:tæfedhesh|tæfedhesh]] || [[word:tæfedhe|tæfedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tafofodhoth|tafofodhoth]] || [[word:tafofodhoj|tafofodhoj]] || [[word:tafofodhosh|tafofodhosh]] || [[word:tafofodho|tafofodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tafodhoth|tafodhoth]] || [[word:tafodhoj|tafodhoj]] || [[word:tafodhosh|tafodhosh]] || [[word:tafodho|tafodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tafofdhoth|tafofdhoth]] || [[word:tafofdhoj|tafofdhoj]] || [[word:tafofdhosh|tafofdhosh]] || [[word:tafofdhof|tafofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tafodhotho|tafodhotho]] || [[word:tafodhojo|tafodhojo]] || [[word:tafodhosho|tafodhosho]] || [[word:tafodhoko|tafodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tafodhoth|tafodhoth]] || [[word:tafodhoj|tafodhoj]] || [[word:tafodhosh|tafodhosh]] || [[word:tafodho|tafodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tafodhothol|tafodhothol]] || [[word:tafodhojol|tafodhojol]] || [[word:tafodhoshol|tafodhoshol]] || [[word:tafodhokol|tafodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tafodhothotho|tafodhothotho]] || [[word:tafodhojojo|tafodhojojo]] || [[word:tafodhoshosho|tafodhoshosho]] || [[word:tafodhoko|tafodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tafodhothon|tafodhothon]] || [[word:tafodhojon|tafodhojon]] || [[word:tafodhoshon|tafodhoshon]] || [[word:tafodhokon|tafodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tafodhothoro|tafodhothoro]] || [[word:tafodhojoro|tafodhojoro]] || [[word:tafodhoshoro|tafodhoshoro]] || [[word:tafodhokoro|tafodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
